ab: Iké kwa sesa na dokiusé aracɨ dra ka Sisipu, maimimuru ɨngmcɨ na sakiké.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Sisipu，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Sisipu, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Sultɨ dra dria, kidri la kébébé dokiusé na ingpicu, sidrisidrisi si sulatɨ ia.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Kuualɨ, kupsalɨ, kutrulu, rɨsa no ma bui dra ksédemɨ.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Makasi iké nia na makurathɨ sasiké, mémani nga ksédemɨ sakiké si isvéré.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Brinɨnga ka rɨsama aunɨ bui dria ksédemɨ nga.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Iké sesa na viéne, angurubwa namɨ brɨlɨlé mwa bɨlatɨ.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Dadɨranɨ dria, Sisipu lapiua béncio, makasi maimuru ɨngmcɨ na sasidrisidrisi sulatɨ.
ch: 路途中，Sisipu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Sisipu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: La kbébé dokiusé sidrisidrisi na sulatɨ, makasi rɨsama biri dria msobaka, imecɨ kɨ mia nia.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Sisipu la dirvanɨ tubi mgaucu msobaka, nakumu rɨsamia aunɨ ksédemɨ kwa sidrisidrisi sulatɨ!!
ch:
Sisipu
急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Sisipu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: La psobaka nia dokiusé, iduru musu mlémɨcɨ, ksédemɨ ni swa na sakiké, si iduru musu sasɨvéré!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Misyenɨnga, Sisipu anglaksɨ mukɨné gako, Sisipu la ra sovri nga dria késɨdɨma dra na sakiké bui dokiusé.
ch: 隔天上學，Sisipu很早就到學校了，Sisipu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Sisipu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Sisipu la sukubu dokiusé dra, psobaka kuyɨnɨnga nungimɨcɨ makɨ sakiké kwa, takdrengé mu mia dokiusé dra drianɨ duru ksédemɨ driana sakiké.
ch: Sisipu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Sisipu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
